raw_consumer_statement:
Subject : Formal Complaint Regarding Unresolved {$12000.00} Refund with Citi Credit Card Dear Sir/Madam , I am submitting a formal complaint regarding an ongoing issue with my Citi AT & T More credit card account ( ending in XXXX ). On XX/XX/XXXX, a payment of {$12000.00} was made from a business checking account ( XXXX XXXX, ending in XXXX ), which resulted in a negative balance on my credit card. The payment is valid and was made by someone I know. I contacted Citi customer service to request a refund of this negative balance via check sent to my billing address. 

In XXXX, I received a letter from Citi asking for a payment receipt for the {$12000.00} transaction. However, the letter did not outline any deadlines or consequences for not providing the receipt. On XX/XX/XXXX, Citi rebilled the {$12000.00} to my credit card account, which was reflected in the XXXX statement. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I faxed the required payment receipt to Citis payment department, and on XX/XX/XXXX, I received written confirmation that they had received the receipt. Then, on XX/XX/XXXX, Citi sent a letter stating that my account had been credited with {$12000.00} as shown in the XXXX statement, which is incorrect. 

Despite numerous calls to Citis customer service and attempts to escalate the issue, the matter remains unresolved. I am requesting your assistance in either issuing a refund of {$12000.00} or crediting the amount back to the original business checking account ending in XXXX. 

Attached are the relevant statements, receipts, and correspondence for your review. I would greatly appreciate your prompt resolution of this matter. 

Sincerely,
